evidence.internal_enqueue: coverage-planner.js _executeVerify and campaign-engine.js executeIteration call submitTask directly
evidence.startup_navigation: server.js main calls ctx.agent.start; agent.js start calls page.goto
evidence.dns: validateTask calls validateUrl; validateUrlAsync and validateRedirect have no runtime callers
evidence.subrequests: agent.js observes request/websocket/navigation events but registers no context.route/page.route interceptor
evidence.scope: matchesScope returns true for any pathname when an origin-bearing pattern hostname matches
evidence.persistence: target-runner.js resumeFromCheckpoint re-submits target_url without the execution guard
